tasks.title: Clippy Unreachable Pattern
tasks.description: intersect() function has unreachable pattern that fails clippy. File: crates/permission/src/models.rs:28. Pattern error: unreachable pattern (AgentPermissionScope::ReadOnly, _) | (_, AgentPermissionScope::ReadOnly) => - no value can reach this
test_criteria: cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings passes without errors
cargo test -p opencode-permission passes all tests
tasks.impl_notes: Fix the intersect() function pattern matching logic to remove unreachable branch

tasks.title: Desktop WebView Integration
tasks.description: WebView is stub-only, not integrated with app lifecycle. File: crates/cli/src/desktop.rs. PRD Reference: FR-015, PRD 13. Phase Impact: Phase 4 (Interface Implementations)
test_criteria: WebView renders correctly and displays content
tasks.impl_notes: Implement actual WebView component per PRD 13, connect WebView to desktop mode properly, share state between TUI and WebView

tasks.title: Session Sharing Between Interfaces
tasks.description: Cross-interface session synchronization is partial. PRD Reference: FR-015. Status: Deferred
test_criteria: Session sharing mechanism designed and documented
tasks.impl_notes: Session sharing mechanism already implemented in session_sharing.rs. Fixed pre-existing UUID bugs in crash_recovery tests that were causing test failures. All session tests now pass.

tasks.title: test_prompt_history_persistence
tasks.description: Assertion failed in history persistence test. File: crates/cli/tests/e2e_prompt_history.rs
tasks.impl_notes: Fixed load_session_records() in session.rs to actually load messages from sessions instead of returning empty messages array. Also fixed related tests (e2e_session_persistence.rs, e2e_session_undo_redo.rs, e2e_session_workflows.rs) that had incorrect message count expectations due to not accounting for session creation message.

tasks.title: test_prompt_history_navigation
tasks.description: history.len() >= 3 assertion failed. File: crates/cli/tests/e2e_prompt_history.rs
tasks.impl_notes: Same root cause as P1-cli-1 - load_session_records() was returning empty messages. Fixed along with P1-cli-1.

tasks.title: Workspace path validation
tasks.description: Workspace path validation needed in core module
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented workspace path validation in ProjectManager::detect(). The detect() function now calls validate_workspace() to ensure paths are validated before creating ProjectInfo. Validation includes: absolute path check, existence check, directory check, readability check, circular symlink detection, and path traversal detection. Updated tests to compare against canonicalized paths since validate_workspace() canonicalizes the path.
